name: C-18 --emit-audit records a gate event jsonl entry per the architecture audit-trail contract
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && printf '2026-05-25T08:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/soc2-tsc.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/control-mapping-gate.sh" --framework soc2-tsc --control-id CC1.1 --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --emit-audit audit.jsonl && [ -s audit.jsonl ] && grep -q 'control-mapping-gate' audit.jsonl && echo audited 1>&2
